experience.oncall_model: follow-the-sun weekly rotations with daytime primary and after-hours secondary

environment.network: segmented VPC with strict egress allowlist; no access to unknown endpoints

service_characteristics.analysis_model: stateless workers performing in-memory analysis using allowed market data feeds
operational_notes: No external API calls from production unless explicitly allowlisted
No long-lived credentials needed by core Arbitrage Finder processes
Prefer immutable infrastructure and declarative config for rollouts
